trait.name: Unwavering
trait.description: The power of carried Attack-type moves that have no additional effect is increased by 30%.

zh.name: 不移
zh.description: 携带的无额外效果的攻击技能，威力+30%。

zh.name: 魔法增效
zh.description: 自己获得魔攻+70%。

zh.name: 防御
zh.description: 减伤70%，应对攻击。

move_pool.name: Sand Toss

zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成物理伤害。

move_pool.description: Deals physical damage to the opponent.

move_pool.name: Ground Stomp

zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成物理伤害。

move_pool.description: Deals physical damage to the opponent.

zh.name: 力量增效
zh.description: 自己获得物攻+100%。

zh.name: 陨石
zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成魔法伤害。

move_pool.description: Deals magic damage to the opponent.

move_pool.name: Equilibrium

zh.name: 钧势
zh.description: 自己获得物防+140%和速度-30。

move_pool.description: User gains Physical Defense +140% and Speed -30.

move_pool.name: Stomp

zh.name: 践踏
zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成物理伤害。

move_pool.description: Deals physical damage to the opponent.

zh.name: 蓄势待发
zh.description: 自己获得1层蓄势印记。

move_pool.name: Earthquake

zh.name: 地震
zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成物理伤害。

move_pool.description: Deals physical damage to the opponent.

move_pool.name: Sand Surge

zh.name: 沙涌
zh.description: 将天气改为沙暴，持续8回合。

move_pool.description: Changes weather to Sandstorm for 8 turns.

move_pool.name: Stone Throw

zh.name: 抛石
zh.description: 造成物伤，回合结束时，本技能能耗永久-5。

move_pool.description: Deals physical damage. At the end of each turn, this move's energy cost -5 permanently.

move_pool.name: Mud Armor

zh.name: 泥浆铠甲
zh.description: 自己获得物攻和物防+40%，应对防御：额外使自己的增益翻倍。

move_pool.description: User gains Physical Attack +50% and Physical Defense +50%. Counter Defense: user's Buffs are doubled.

move_pool.name: Stone Splitter

zh.name: 裂石
zh.description: 造成物伤，应对状态：敌方获得物防-80%。

move_pool.description: Deals physical damage. Counter Status: opponent gains Physical Defense -80%.

move_pool.name: Pitfall

zh.name: 地陷
zh.description: 造成物伤，自己获得物防+60%，应对状态：本次技能威力翻倍，且物防额外+60%。

move_pool.description: Deals physical damage. Gains Physical Defense +60%. Counter Status: this move's power is doubled, and Physical Defense +60% additionally.

move_stones.name: Sonic Boom

zh.name: 音爆
zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成魔法伤害。

move_stones.description: Deals magic damage to the opponent.

move_stones.name: Pursuit

zh.name: 追打
zh.description: 造成魔伤，1连击，应对状态：本技能变为3连击。

move_stones.description: Deals magic damage. 1 Combo. Counter Status: this move becomes 3 Combo.

move_stones.name: Sneak Attack

zh.name: 偷袭
zh.description: 造成物伤，应对状态：本次技能威力变为3倍。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. Counter Status: move power x3.

move_stones.name: Stress Response

zh.name: 应激反应
zh.description: 自己回复25%生命，应对防御：改为回复50%生命。

move_stones.description: User restores 25% HP. Counter Defense: user restores 50% HP instead.

move_stones.name: Rewrite

zh.name: 复写
zh.description: 每回合随机变成自己未携带的技能，且该技能能耗-2。

move_stones.description: Each turn, this move becomes a random uncarried move from this monster, and its energy cost -2.
